user.title: TikTok TTS — Choose API Mode
user.description:
Select how this integration connects to TikTok TTS.

**Community Proxy** (recommended) — No TikTok account needed. Uses the open-source proxy by [Weilbyte](https://github.com/Weilbyte/tiktok-tts). You can self-host your own instance for better reliability.

**Direct API** — Calls TikTok's servers directly using your TikTok session cookie. Requires a TikTok account and may violate TikTok's Terms of Service.

---
*Originally by [@philipp-luettecke](https://github.com/philipp-luettecke/tiktoktts). Forked and extended by [@sfox38](https://github.com/sfox38/tiktoktts).*

proxy.title: TikTok TTS — Proxy Configuration
proxy.description: The default endpoint is the community proxy hosted by [Weilbyte](https://github.com/Weilbyte/tiktok-tts). For better reliability you can self-host your own instance and enter its URL here.

direct.title: TikTok TTS — Direct API Configuration
direct.description:
⚠️ **Warning:** This uses TikTok's unofficial internal API, reverse-engineered by the open-source community. Use may violate TikTok's Terms of Service. Use at your own risk.

To find your session ID:
1. Log in to TikTok in your browser
2. Open Developer Tools (F12) → Application → Cookies
3. Copy the value of the `sessionid` cookie

error.endpoint_unavailable: The endpoint responded but reports it is currently unavailable.
error.endpoint_bad_status: The endpoint returned an unexpected HTTP status code.
error.endpoint_timeout: Connection timed out. Check the URL and your network.
error.endpoint_connection_error: Could not connect to the endpoint. Check the URL is correct.
error.endpoint_unknown_error: An unexpected error occurred while testing the endpoint.
error.direct_api_rejected: TikTok rejected the request. Your session ID may be invalid or expired.

init.title: TikTok TTS — Update Settings
init.description: Update the endpoint URL, session ID (direct mode only), or default voice. Changes take effect immediately after saving — no restart needed.

error.endpoint_unavailable: The endpoint responded but reports it is currently unavailable.
error.endpoint_bad_status: The endpoint returned an unexpected HTTP status code.
error.endpoint_timeout: Connection timed out. Check the URL and your network.
error.endpoint_connection_error: Could not connect. Check the URL is correct.
error.endpoint_unknown_error: An unexpected error occurred while testing the endpoint.
error.direct_api_rejected: TikTok rejected the request. Your session ID may be invalid or expired.

direct_api_session_expired.title: TikTok TTS: Direct API session expired
direct_api_session_expired.description:
Your TikTok session ID is invalid or has expired. TikTok TTS (Direct API mode) will not work until you update it.

To fix this:
1. Log in to TikTok in your browser
2. Open Developer Tools (F12) → Application → Cookies
3. Copy the value of the `sessionid` cookie
4. Go to **Settings → Devices & Services → TikTok TTS → Configure** and paste the new session ID.
